missions.title: Dawn Patrol
missions.objective: Fly through Meridian and answer the first emergency.

missions.title: The Burning Spire
missions.objective: Rescue civilians from a tower fire before panic spreads.

missions.title: Ghosts in the Grid
missions.objective: Disable rogue civic drones without harming the city.

missions.title: Stormwall Protocol
missions.objective: Use unlocked powers to protect Meridian during a citywide surge.

missions.title: Null Choir Rising
missions.objective: Survive a wave of Null Choir ground units as the surge breaks open.

missions.title: Civic Grid Down
missions.objective: Restore power to a blacked-out district and calm the panicking crowds.

missions.title: The Long Night
missions.objective: Hold an extended patrol as the emergencies escalate across Meridian.

missions.title: First Contact
missions.objective: Confront a Null Choir commander at the heart of the surge.

missions.title: Dawn Aftershock
missions.objective: Stabilize Meridian's grid after the Null Choir retreat before morning traffic returns.

missions.title: Tether Rescue
missions.objective: Brace the drifting sky-rail car with E aegis field before the tether snaps.

missions.title: Skyway Runaway
missions.objective: Use Orbit Sprint / Shift to overtake the runaway skyway capsule and stabilize it before it crashes.
